summary: Iteration 53: Comprehensive testing of Change Password functionality, Agency Module Saving, and Billing (Faturalama) visibility. All features verified working correctly via both backend API tests (12/12 passed) and frontend Playwright UI tests.
passed_tests: Change Password - Wrong current password returns 400 with 'Mevcut şifre hatalı'
Change Password - Short password (<8 chars) rejected with 422
Change Password - Password without special char rejected (policy violation)
Change Password - Same password rejected with 'aynı olamaz' message
Change Password - Full flow: change -> login with new -> restore -> login with restored
Change Password - Admin user has access to change-password endpoint
Agency Modules - GET /api/admin/agencies/{id}/modules returns current modules
Agency Modules - PUT /api/admin/agencies/{id}/modules saves modules correctly
Agency Modules - Empty array clears all modules
Agency Modules - Agency user cannot access admin module endpoints (403)
Billing Visibility - Agency user roles do NOT include billing access
Billing Visibility - Admin user roles DO include billing access
UI: Agency user - Faturalama link NOT visible in sidebar (correct)
UI: Agency user - Settings page shows Change Password card
UI: Agency user - Wrong password shows error toast 'Mevcut şifre hatalı'
UI: Admin user - Faturalama link IS visible in sidebar (correct)
UI: Admin user - Settings page shows Change Password card
UI: Admin user - Acenta Modülleri page shows agency cards with expand/collapse
UI: Admin user - Module toggles (9 modules) display correctly in expanded card
UI: Admin user - Kaydet (Save) button present for module management
critical_code_review_comments: Good: ChangePasswordCard has comprehensive data-testid coverage for automated testing
Good: Password policy enforced server-side (10 chars, uppercase, number, special char)
Good: Password change revokes other active sessions for security
Good: ACCOUNT_NAV_ITEMS in appNavigation.js correctly uses visibleScopes: ['admin'] for Faturalama
Good: NewSidebar correctly filters items based on visibleScopes
Good: Agency module management UI supports Select All / Remove All / individual toggles
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Password restored to original after change test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 verified: (1) Change Password works for both agency and admin users with proper validation (wrong password, weak password, same password all rejected), (2) Agency Module saving via /api/admin/agencies/{id}/modules works correctly with CRUD operations, (3) Billing (Faturalama) link is correctly hidden from agency users and visible to admin users. All data-testid attributes are in place for testing. Rate limiting is active - clear rate_limits collection before testing if needed. Agency1 demo user password is 'Agency12345!'.
